module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `xendesktop_index` `xd_desktops_sourcetype` $vm_name$ | table vm_name AgentVersion ApplicationsInUse AssignedClientName AssignedIPAddress AssociatedUserFullNames AssociatedUserNames AssociatedUserUPNs AutonomouslyBrokered CatalogKind CatalogName CatalogUid ClientAddress ClientName ClientVersion ColorDepth ConnectedViaHostName ConnectedViaIP ControllerDNSName DNSName Description DesktopConditions DesktopGroupName DesktopGroupUid DesktopKind DeviceId HardwareId HostedMachineId HostedMachineName HostingServerName HypervisorConnectionName HypervisorConnectionUid IPAddress IconUid ImageOutOfDate InMaintenanceMode IsAssigned LastConnectionFailure LastConnectionTime LastConnectionUser LastDeregistrationReason LastDeregistrationTime LastHostingUpdateTime LaunchedViaHostName LaunchedViaIP LicenseId MachineName MachineUid OSType OSVersion PowerActionPending PowerState Protocol PublishedApplications RegistrationState SID | transpose
